business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy number CP-LSPH-2025-7801, effective 07/01/2025; 1 claim in 2024; no cancellations

positives: All 8 locations fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
24-hour doorperson or security on all premises
Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
Written contracts in place with all subcontractors
Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
No OSHA citations in the past 3 years
No policy cancellations in prior 3 years
Short-term rentals (less than 1 year) not permitted
Recent system updates: Plumbing 2015, HVAC 2018, Electrical 2023
24 years in business with 18 years of stable current management
concerns: No formal safety program in place
EV charging stations installed on premises — elevated fire and liability exposure
Swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities present — increased premises liability exposure
2 claims reported over the prior 3 policy years (2022 and 2024)
LOC-006 (1400 Enclave Parkway, Houston) built in 1995 — oldest building in portfolio
Plumbing last updated in 2015 — approaching age threshold for potential risk concerns
Hours of operation Mon–Sat only; no Sunday coverage noted
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 2 claims over 3 years: 1 claim in 2022 (AIG, premium $447,842.42), 0 claims in 2023 (Zurich, premium $423,914.72), 1 claim in 2024 (CNA Financial, premium $414,601.77). No cancellations in any year. Premiums trending downward year-over-year.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas. Portfolio consists of 8 locations totaling 1,056,000 square feet across office and mercantile occupancies in Dallas, Houston, Plano, Fort Worth, and Southlake, TX. Annual revenue of $67,000,000 with 145 full-time and 28 part-time employees. Hours of operation are Monday through Saturday, 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: No formal safety program in place. Written contracts with indemnification clauses required from all contractors. Written contracts maintained with all subcontractors. All locations fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring. 24-hour doorperson or security on premises. No OSHA citations in the past 3 years. Last system updates: Plumbing 2015, HVAC 2018, Electrical 2023.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Three-year loss history: 2022 — 1 claim with American International Group (premium $447,842.42, no cancellation); 2023 — 0 claims with Zurich Insurance Group (premium $423,914.72, no cancellation); 2024 — 1 claim with CNA Financial (premium $414,601.77, no cancellation). Total of 2 claims across 3 policy years with no carrier cancellations.
